# explain_code.snippet.md

## Use
Explain one function or method quickly.

## Prompt
```
Explain this code concisely.
Input:
- File: <path>
- Symbol: <function_or_method>
Output format:
1) Purpose (1-2 lines)
2) Inputs/Outputs
3) Side effects
4) Risks or edge cases (max 3)
Keep under 180 tokens.
```
